name: Nord
aciklama: **Nord** Arctic paleti: `#2e3440`, `#3b4252`, metin `#eceff4`, Frost `#88c0d0` / `#81a1c1`, uyarı `#ebcb8b`, tehlike `#bf616a`. Kaynak: nordtheme.com. Meridian zinciri (`meridian` → `nord`). `active_theme` veya `ui_theme` => `nord`.
body_class: app-shell theme-meridian theme-nord cpp-shell d-flex flex-column min-vh-100
main_class: esh-app-main flex-grow-1 d-flex flex-column mr-main cpp-main
